workload: canonical traced RUN-first argmax, 30 layers, 256-token canvas, seed 0, three blocks
source_state: dirty DiffusionGemma-local working tree; final default reproduced after stage-review attribution correction
candidate: place each dynamic logits slice, subtract/exp, denominator reduction, and ordered denominator accumulator in interleaved L1

selector.name: DG_SELFCOND_LOGITS_L1
selector.placement_contract: TTNN sum/add inherit first-input memory: denominator stays L1 from exp; DRAM matmul keeps numerator and final divide DRAM

component_ms.note: Operations, chunk boundaries, BF16 values, matmul shapes, and ordered accumulation are unchanged; chunk matmuls, numerator accumulation, and final divide stay DRAM.

independent_process_at48.full_generation_interpretation: First-block trace-capture variance dominates the three-block full-generation totals; no independent-process full-generation speedup is claimed.

standalone_at12.interpretation: Historical variance samples only. The reviewed current final_unset_default @12 row is 4.3122 s / 59.366 t/s below.

same_model_sequential_anomaly.status: contradictory second-session result retained as a limitation; production and final-default evidence use one fresh session per process

review_followup_explicit_memory_argument.decision: materially slower final reproduction; explicit arguments removed in favor of the measured inherited-placement form

final_unset_default.headline_policy: Use this final stage-review-followup selector-unset result rather than faster earlier or explicit-candidate samples.

correctness.argmax_decisions: PASS after stage-review rerun, 48/48 exact across six fields; selfcond_logits_l1_decisions.json
correctness.production_chunked_gumbel_decisions: PASS after stage-review rerun, 48/48 exact across six fields; selfcond_logits_l1_gumbel_decisions.json
correctness.production_chunked_gumbel_qualitative: PASS, three prompt-correct outputs and commits exact; selfcond_logits_l1_gumbel_qualitative.json
correctness.full_depth_256k: PASS, 30 layers, 48 steps, production chunked-Gumbel; selfcond_logits_l1_256k_chunked.json

discarded_experiments.l1_numerator_and_divide: Placing numerator matmuls/accumulation and final divide in L1 saved only 0.375 ms beyond chain. Its traced attempt was discarded because an external hardware test started after preflight and overlapped the run; the mode was removed.
discarded_experiments.larger_vocab_chunks: 32K grouping was +0.95% warmed @48 but changed the canonical clean-commit digest; rejected and removed; selfcond_vocab_chunk_rejection.json
discarded_experiments.explicit_memory_arguments: Stage-review follow-up made inherited output placement explicit; the final run regressed to 18.771 t/s, so those arguments were removed and the inherited placement is now source-commented and unit-tested.
